prestazioni: 3.0L Ford Cyclone V6 (Engine Code: MHT) twin-turbo hybrid powertrain upgrade with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel, 106mm turbine wheel) paired with a custom BorgWarner EFR 9280 turbo for the electric motor assist, ensuring 18 psi of boost with a Precision Turbo & Engine wastegate (PN: 35mm) for precise control. Supporting mods include a PTP Motorsports titanium turbo-back exhaust with 3.5-inch 304 stainless steel piping and a Vibrant 1799 ultra-quiet resonator delete for optimized scavenging.

Full hybrid system recalibration via HP Tuners MPVI3 with a custom OS (Operating System) flash targeting 550whp/600wtq at the wheels, utilizing a Motec M150 ECU for real-time hybrid torque vectoring and regenerative braking optimization. The 48V lithium-ion battery is upgraded to a Lithionics Battery GTX48-300 (300Ah, 14.4kWh) with a custom liquid-cooling loop (Koolance EXT-440CU) to sustain high-output discharge rates under track conditions.

Suspension overhaul with a KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover kit (PN: 35231001) featuring 400lb/in front and 500lb/in rear springs, paired with an Ohlins TTX46ML 4-way adjustable damper setup for the rear multi-link suspension. Chassis reinforcement includes a Cusco Type-RS 2-point strut tower bar (PN: 601 540 A) and a full Whiteline front and rear sway bar kit (PN: BMR78X for front, BSR75X for rear) with adjustable end links (Whiteline PN: KLC16).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit (PN: LB-AVIATOR-GT) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (2.5-inch extended wheel arches) and a 3M Matte Graphite Gray vinyl wrap with a satin clear coat overlay for UV protection. The kit includes a custom front splitter (Liberty Walk PN: LB-SPLITTER-AVIATOR) and a rear diffuser (Liberty Walk PN: LB-DIFFUSER-AVIATOR) with integrated dual 4-inch exhaust cutouts for the PTP Motorsports exhaust.

Rocket Bunny rear spoiler (PN: PB-S017) in dry carbon fiber with a 3-inch adjustable Gurney flap, paired with a custom front canard kit (Seibon Carbon PN: AVIATOR-CANARD) for aggressive aero balance. Wheel setup consists of Forgeline GA3R 21x10.5 ET25 (front) and 21x12 ET40 (rear) in a custom brushed titanium finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/21 front, 315/30/21 rear) for maximum mechanical grip.

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara headliner (EuroCompulsion PN: AVIATOR-HEADLINER) and Recaro Pole Position seats (PN: 208050) in black Alcantara with red contrast stitching, paired with a custom roll cage (Autopower Industries 8-point bolt-in cage, PN: AP-8P-AVIATOR) wrapped in red suede. The steering wheel is replaced with a Momo Prototipo (PN: 0111201210) featuring a custom Lincoln emblem in carbon fiber, and the shift knob is upgraded to a B&M Ripper (PN: 80777) with a carbon fiber shift boot.
